The entry records the mathematical object, condition, or operator named by the title and prepares it for the locked TZPID four-page layout.

\[
\begin{aligned}
\mathfrak{W}_{\mathrm{TZP}}\!\left(\mathcal{K}_{1370}\right)
&\longmapsto
\left\langle \rho_{\mathrm{vac}},\; \Omega^{\mathbb{T}},\; \Psi_{\mathrm{T}} \right\rangle
\end{aligned}
\]
\[
\mathcal{K}_{1370}
:=
\operatorname{HoldForm}\!\left(\mathcal{T}_{1370}\right)
\]
\[
\begin{aligned}
\operatorname{Admissible}_{\mathrm{TZP}}\!\left(\mathcal{K}_{1370}\right)
&\Longleftrightarrow
\mathfrak{W}_{\mathrm{TZP}}\!\left(\mathcal{K}_{1370}\right)\not\equiv\varnothing
\end{aligned}
\]
